== Notes for [[Item:Q110755|Q110755]] ==

ID: I180877

Name: Umm bint Isma'il al-Mansur , Princess of Egypt 1

Sex: F

Name: bint al-MANSUR 1

Birth: ABT 920 in Egypt 1

Father: Isma'il al-Mansur , Caliph of Egypt b: ABT 899 in Egypt

Marriage 1 Qarais ibn Abbad , Emir of Seville b: ABT 918 in Seville, Spain

Children

Ismail ibn Qarais , Emir of Seville b: 951 in Seville, Spain

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
